properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V1 V2 V3 V4

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Give thanks with a grateful heart Give thanks to the Holy One Give thanks because He's given Jesus Christ, His Son

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: And now let the weak say, "I am strong" Let the poor say, "I am rich Because of what the Lord has done for us"

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: And now let the weak say, "I am strong" Let the poor say, "I am rich Because of what the Lord has done for us" Give thanks

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: We give thanks to You oh Lord We give thanks
